extraction.one_line_summary: COQUARD Bryan won the sprint after Vital Concept led out through the final turn, beating Cavendish by 4 seconds in a late-disrupted Quick-Step train
tactical_patterns: Vital Concept successfully hijacked sprint positioning through final turn against Quick-Step, demonstrating second-tier teams can disrupt leadouts in Oman finishes.
Quick-Step lost positioning control before final turn despite fronting earlier, suggesting cornerwork more critical than early commitment in these Gulf finishes.

rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: positive: Vital Concept won positioning battle through final technical turn against better-resourced Quick-Step train
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Lost 4 seconds despite Quick-Step controlling earlier, indicating vulnerability when leadout breaks down in final 500m
